website development.title: website development
website development.description: Take the next step in your entrepreneurship journey; Get a website that screams my business is here with all the functionality necessary to give your customers and experience they'll never forget
website development.disclaimer: Websites carry a monthly maintenance and yearly domain fee of $100.00 TTD, your first month and year are free!

logos.title: logos
logos.description: Its competitive out there, you need a symbol that sets you apart and and can reliably be used everywhere. Get yourself a logo today

flyers.title: flyers
flyers.description: Need the people who need to know, know? Get a flyer that gives the details of your operation while still looking engaging.

social media.title: Social Media
social media.description: Do you have a business vision that you can't quite get down? Let's work together on creating a consistent, engaging and unique online presence so you can feel confident saying, 'This is my business and this is what we provide'
social media.disclaimer: The starting package includes 5 static posts and 1 reel!
